title: PRD: event type filter + classifier
meta: PR #47 · branch cursor/event-type-filter-prd-e318 · issue #46 · docs only
glance: Research + PRD for filtering the shared feed by event type. Keyword rules fail on playful SF Luma titles; recommend async LLM classification into a small closed taxonomy, then type filter pills.
backgroundDeep: Event Radar stores Luma-scraped events (title, description, location, host, is_online) with no category field. Feed filters today are response-state only (all/pending/accepted).
backgroundNarrow: This branch adds docs under docs/prd/ plus a read-only dump script. Production InsForge could not be queried in the cloud agent (missing API key), so research used a public Luma SF discover proxy corpus.
goal: Give humans a clear, implementable plan: taxonomy, classifier contract, and filter UX — without shipping app code yet.
figure: Ingest→async classify→primary_type→feed pills
intuition: Insert first so calendar sync never waits on a model. Untyped rows stay under All; Other means we tried and could not type it.

steps.label: Research corpus
steps.body: Proxy SF titles show multi-intent events (e.g. paddle + AI branding). Keyword maps mis-label the interesting middle.

steps.label: PRD taxonomy
steps.body: Closed set: social, builders, talks, sports, arts, other. LLM at classify-time with soft fallback; admin override.

steps.label: Contract tightening
steps.body: type_source enum, async post-ingest, Other excludes untyped — so a future agent can implement without guessing.

quiz.q: Does this PR ship feed type filters in the app?
feedback: ✅ Docs prepare a later implementation issue.

options: LLMs are illegal at ingest time
Calendar sync can ingest many events; waiting on the model risks timeouts

quiz.q: Should untyped events appear under Other?
options: No — Other is for classified-as-other / fallback
feedback: ✅ Untyped stays in All until typed.

quiz.q: What should you run locally before implementation?
feedback: ✅ Prod sample was missing from the cloud run.

options: social, builders, talks, sports, arts, other

microWorld: Optional later: a tiny playground that shows title → predicted type for the proxy corpus.
